title: oenothera ornata
intro: Oenothera ornata, also known as the showy evening primrose, is a flowering plant native to the western United States and Canada. It has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to its high content of linolenic acid and other fatty acids. The health benefits of Oenothera ornata include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve heart health, and support skin health, making it a popular ingredient in herbal preparations. Oenothera ornata can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used to soothe skin irritations and promote wound healing.
